title: new-relyingparty-service
description: The relying-party (inspection) service configuration: the credential types requested, terms and conditions, and delivery/expiry settings

mode.description: single (default) one-off request, or feed for an ongoing relationship where presentations may be received over time. Controls delivery only — not whether credentials are checked.

velocityNetworkServiceId.description: the Velocity Network service id fragment, e.g. #inspection-1. Must match the service registered on the Network for this tenant.

description.description: Description field for this inspection configuration

termsUrl.description: link to online terms and conditions for the disclosure

disclosureRequest.description: describes what the verifier is asking the holder to present

types.description: the set of credential types that are to be disclosed

type.description: the credential type to be disclosed

retentionPeriod.description: Length of time the disclosure agreement will last, as an ISO 8601 duration (PxYxMxWxD). Examples: P60D = 60 days; P1Y30D = 1 year and 30 days.

deactivationDate.description: can be configured to deactivate at a predetermined time or to be deactivated on demand by setting this to now

presentationRequestsExpireIn.description: how many seconds before presentation requests issued by this service expire. Default is 10 minutes.
